asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: An excellent narrated explainer video demonstrating NodeRoom's collaborative spreadsheet, agent proposal workflow, and cell-level version history for an investment committee use case.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates agent proposals, human approval, and cell versioning history.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the end-to-end flow from agent ingestion to proposal review and final cell commit.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark mode interface with smooth transitions and focused zoom-ins on key interactions.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the core NodeRoom concept of versioned spreadsheets and multi-agent collaboration.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows actual UI state changes, cell history logs, and interactive approval flows.

legibility.evidence: Text is generally readable, aided by timely zoom-ins on dense spreadsheet areas.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to finance and investment professionals requiring data provenance and audit trails.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the agent's role as a drafting assistant rather than an autonomous decision-maker.

observedEvidence: Agent proposal workflow with 'Review mode ON'
Cell-level version history and attribution panel
Interactive spreadsheet with live collaboration features

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell values and small labels are slightly hard to read before the zoom-in occurs.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the default font size or start with a tighter crop on the active workspace.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom enables high-trust investment workflows with versioned spreadsheets, agent proposals, and full audit trails.
